Description: Add optional Epic 4 settings for OpenAI categorization, including configurable category names and rule text.

Stories.StoryDescription: Add optional categorization settings covering enablement, OpenAI credentials, model name, category definitions, and image upload sizing.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: The project has typed settings for optional AI categorization and defaults include all configured categories.

Stories.StoryDescription: Represent categories and their rules in one configurable structure so prompt generation and validation use the same taxonomy.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Category names and rules are centrally defined and can be reused without duplicating logic.
